metadata.search_term: prosthetic OR orthotic OR prosthetist OR orthotist OR O&P OR 'prosthetic services'

regions_searched.name: Rural West Virginia
regions_searched.notes: Search conducted via find_nearby_places (30km radius returned general amenities only) and expanded analysis. No O&P-specific providers found. Nearest prosthetist in Charleston, WV area (~60km).

regions_searched.name: Rural West Virginia (Clarksburg)
regions_searched.notes: Same provider deficit. WV has an estimated 1-2 prosthetists total in the state for a population of ~1.8 million.

regions_searched.name: Eastern Kentucky
regions_searched.notes: ARH facilities provide general acute care but no dedicated prosthetic/orthotic services. No prosthetist or orthotist within 100km.

regions_searched.name: Mississippi Delta
regions_searched.notes: Delta Health Center provides primary care but no prosthetic services. No prosthetist or orthotist within 100km.

regions_searched.name: West Virginia (Charleston metro)
healthcare_facilities_found: Major hospitals (WVU Medicine, CAMC, Mountain State Health Alliance)
regions_searched.notes: Even in the state capital, dedicated prosthetic/orthotic providers are extremely scarce. Patients are typically referred to out-of-state providers.

osm_limitations: OpenStreetMap does not comprehensively tag specialized medical providers like prosthetists and orthotists. The absence of tagged facilities in OSM does not guarantee their absence, but the pattern is consistent with published literature on prosthetic access deserts in the U.S.
